name: Replimune Group, Inc.
summary: Replimune Group, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing oncolytic immunotherapies for cancer treatment. Its proprietary RPx platform is based on an engineered HSV-1 backbone designed to maximize immunogenic cell death and systemic anti-tumor immune response. Lead product RP1 (vusolimogene oderparepvec) is being evaluated in melanoma and non-melanoma skin cancers, with a BLA submitted to the FDA in combination with nivolumab for anti-PD-1 failed advanced melanoma, granted priority review with a PDUFA date of July 22, 2025.
